operational_scenes.scene_title: Tote Status and Exchange Thresholds Overview
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain tote status details and exchange threshold settings
operational_intents: Describe tote status information and initialization
Explain current task and exchange types for totes
Detail threshold percentages and methods for exchanges
Clarify software capabilities for threshold updates
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract detailed operational parameters and threshold configurations
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Focus on tote status and exchange threshold operational details

operational_scenes.scene_title: Access and Diagnostic Procedures for Aviva System
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Clarify access restrictions and initial diagnostic steps for Aviva
operational_intents: Explain lack of direct access to Aviva for support
Describe first step diagnostics using RMS screen
Outline communication protocols with UPS and operators
Clarify system boundaries and data flow limitations
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Identify access policies and initial diagnostic workflows
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Define operational boundaries and first response diagnostics

operational_scenes.scene_title: Diagnosing Issues Between OPC and Aviva Systems
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain how to diagnose issues between OPC and Aviva
operational_intents: Describe Aviva as an HMI showing service status only
Explain API usage for system state and fault detection
Differentiate types of errors: REST API, business exceptions, system exceptions
Outline steps to verify system state and communication issues
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract diagnostic criteria and error classification methods
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Focus on operational diagnosis of system integration issues

operational_scenes.scene_title: Support Role and Diagnostic Workflow for System Issues
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Define support responsibilities and diagnostic workflow
operational_intents: Emphasize note-taking for later diagnosis
Explain how to determine if issue is Aviva or communication related
Describe operator guidance for diagnostics
Outline use of system status and commands for troubleshooting
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Capture support procedures and diagnostic communication protocols
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Clarify support operational workflow during incidents

operational_scenes.primary_intent: Discuss incident management, escalation, and collaboration
operational_intents: Explain urgency and SLA requirements for P1 issues
Differentiate error types and corresponding escalation paths
Describe runbook usage for business exceptions
Outline collaboration between support, HMI team, and infrastructure
Discuss API monitoring and callback mechanisms for issue tracking
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract incident response and escalation protocols
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Focus on operational incident handling and team coordination

operational_scenes.primary_intent: Address challenges and strategies for recurring issues
operational_intents: Acknowledge problems caused by recurring issues
Discuss expectations for support in preventing repeats
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Identify operational challenges and support improvement areas
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Highlight recurring issue management in support
